name: Keeper-Security
description: Keeper Security - Keeper Admin, Keeper MSP, Keeper Secrets, and Keeper Setup plugins with skills, commands, agents, and the Keeper Docs MCP server

metadata.description: Keeper Security - Keeper Admin, Keeper MSP, Keeper Secrets, and Keeper Setup plugins with skills, commands, agents, and the Keeper Docs MCP server

plugins.name: keeper-admin
plugins.description: Manage Keeper Vault, enterprise administration, PAM, and privileged access using Keeper Commander CLI (keeper).

plugins.name: keeper-msp
plugins.description: Manage a Keeper MSP tenant using Keeper Commander CLI (keeper): managed companies, licenses and add-ons, MSP billing reports, switch-to-mc context switching, and distributor operations.

plugins.name: keeper-secrets
plugins.description: Retrieve, inject, and manage secrets from Keeper Vault using KSM CLI (ksm) for developer workflows, including ksm exec, interpolate, and Keeper notation.

plugins.name: keeper-setup
plugins.description: Install and configure Keeper CLI tools (KSM CLI and Commander) for the Keeper Security marketplace, including profiles and authentication.
